title: Serpocaulon polystichum
intro: Serpocaulon polystichum, also known as Polypodium polystichum, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its reported health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antifungal properties, which may help to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and prevent infections. The bioactive constituents of Serpocaulon polystichum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpenes, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Serpocaulon polystichum is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and is commonly used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as to support digestive health.
